text.title: Immersive Design Principles Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the experience offer teleport (or arm-swing) as locomotion default?

branch.question: Are flashing / audio / haptic within budget?
Is a retreat-option persistently available ≤2 inputs?

text.example: Concrete walk: Training VR module: teleport default, vignette on, audio -6 dBFS peak, return-home always on wrist menu → approve.
